issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill is vendor-locked to PartyKit, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Live cursors for collaborative note-taking app
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for raw ws server and native WebSocket on the client; treatment matches the documented Party.Server class with broadcast-exclusion and usePartySocket plus npx partykit deploy.

scenarios.name: Real-time audience polling with live tally
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on socket.io rooms with no PartyKit specifics; treatment uses Party.Server, onConnect state replay, room.broadcast, room-per-poll partitioning and the partykit CLI.
